response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple high-impact roles. His background in scalable architectures, AWS services, and Kubernetes aligns well with the job requirements. While he may not have direct experience with PostgreSQL or renovation/energy platforms, his adaptability and deep technical expertise suggest he could quickly learn and contribute effectively.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js in production environments
Proven expertise in scalable architectures, AWS services (ECS, RDS), and Kubernetes
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability across diverse tech stacks (Dlang, Java, etc.)
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB and MySQL)
No explicit mention of energy/renovation or construction technology domains
May be overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, which could lead to rapid role growth expectations
